context: =  focal area of attenuation < 20 HU / fat-suppression on MR Prevalence:   16-43% on CT; 85% on autopsy; ↑ with age Location:   anterolateral free wall + RVOT Site:   outer half of RV wall → extension toward endocardium sparing subendocardium √  increase of total myocardial thickness: RV > LV Physiologic RV myocardial fat is most frequent on anterolateral free wall, i.e. basal superior wall > middle superior wall > RVOT! Prevalence:   22-62% with history of MI Location:   subendocardial region of culprit coronary a. √  thin linear / curvilinear configuration
